params.markdown:
**Navigation**

**Office 365**  

- [Audit Events](#/dashboard/o365-712e2c00-685d-11ea-8d6a-292ef5d68366)
- Reports
   - [Microsoft Teams User Activity](#/dashboard/o365-2abb4172-9e95-458a-8ade-64403457b1f0)
   - [Office 365 Groups Activity](#/dashboard/o365-9edf2772-2d81-4c6d-bb24-fa72c997a572)
   - [OneDrive Usage](#/dashboard/o365-5a19bdb2-e9c5-4774-8397-9e1501d70e3a)
   - [SharePoint Site Usage](#/dashboard/o365-94cfedee-04b7-4242-a27c-b3deb3b7e883)
   - **Viva Engage Groups Activity**

**Overview**

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of insights into the Viva Engage Groups Activity in your organization.

It provides essential metrics such as total number of posts created, liked, and read. It contains a view of total active groups broken-down by activity type per day. It also includes several timeline visualisations such as group activity by activity type, top groups with total members, and top groups with most posts.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/o365/overview)
